titleStmt.title: Telegraph from Frongoch to Sir Robert Chalmers, 26 July 1916
Letters 1916-1923

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Telegraph from Frongoch to Sir Robert Chalmers regarding the release of 38 Irish prisoners from the camp
Sir Robert Chalmers was appointed Under-Secretary of Ireland in 1916, replacing Sir Matthew Nathan (1862-1939) in the aftermath of the Easter Rising.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
OHMS Priority
Bala Handed in at} 7.30pm Received here at} 8.49pm
TO Under Secretary Dublin
Castle Dublin
C. 327 following 38 Irish prisoners
will be released 8 pm
tomorrow friday evening and travel
via Holyhead and Kingstown route
869 B. Redmond Owen ferns 869 a.
Roche John Ferns 1010 Sinnott
2/ u.s. Castle Dn
John wexford aaa Dublin County
607 beggs Joseph Skerries 1100 C.
Broohy Daniel Rathfarnham 1102 a. Cowley
Michael Rathfarnham 621 C. Cullen Alex
H. Dundrum 621 B. Cunnungham John
Dundrum 612 F. Doyle William 28
3/ u.s. Castle Dn
n. Frederick St. Dublin 1100 B.
Caddell Patrick Lusk 1526 C. Caffrey
Matthew Lower Rathfarnham 619 C. Christie
Peter Artane 1405 D. Conlon James
Ashtown 603 A. Duff Thomas Swords
1221 B. Duffy Chris Castleknock 1221 B.
4/ U.S. Castle Dn
DuffyEdward Castleknock 605 Hand
Thomas Skerries 1464 C. Hynes John
Francis Lusk 620 B. Joyce John
Artane 1530 Lee Joseph Rathfarnham
627 Mcguinness Joseph Skerries 1117
Mcnally John Lusk 1192 Mcnulty
(5) U.S. Castle Dn
Peter Blanchardstown 1192 Mcnulty michael
Blanchardstown 662 Moran Peter Cloughran
1187 Mooney John Castleknock 1187
Mooney Patrick Castleknock 612 Moran
Chris Swords 673 Murtagh Lawrence
Chapelizod 1187 Mulvey William Rathfarnham
6/ U.S. Castle Dn
610 Murphy Francis Lusk 612
Nugent Chris Swords 1394 Oconnor
Patrick Rathfarnham 1530 OconnellJames
Malahide 811 Rogers Michael Rathfarnham
612 Stafford Edward Swords 1301
Wardick James Lower Rathfarnham 620 C.
OHMS
Bala
Under Secy (7)
Lanigan Patk artane
Priswarian Frongoch
